reflection.candidate_lesson: When internal regime confirmation runs internal-only (no external TV signals in the last 2h) AND confidence is capped at 65%, the 75% sizing multiplier should be tightened further to 60% because internal-only MOMENTUM calls lack cross-validation and are the regime-appropriateness failure mode Tenet 2 warns against.
reflection.mechanism: Internal regime detection without external confirmation is a single-source signal. When TradingView returns 0 signals, there is no independent price-action witness that the momentum regime is real vs. an artifact of internal indicator autocorrelation. Institutionally, this is the equivalent of trading on your own order flow without seeing the tape — you cannot distinguish genuine directional commitment from mean-reverting chop. Sizing at 75% still deploys meaningful risk against an unwitnessed thesis.
reflection.testable_rule: if regime_confirmation.source == 'internal_only' and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65: sizing_multiplier = min(sizing_multiplier, 0.60)

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
